args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop';$ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue';$proxy=$null;$proxyCandidate=$null;if($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT){$proxyCandidate=[IO.Path]::Combine($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT,'hooks','enrilsp-lsp-proxy.ps1');if(Test-Path $proxyCandidate){$proxy=$proxyCandidate}};if(-not $proxy){$proxyCandidate=[IO.Path]::Combine($env:LOCALAPPDATA,'EnriLSP','bin','enrilsp-lsp-proxy.ps1');if(Test-Path $proxyCandidate){$proxy=$proxyCandidate}};if(-not $proxy){$proxyCandidate=[IO.Path]::Combine((Get-Location).Path,'hooks','enrilsp-lsp-proxy.ps1');if(Test-Path $proxyCandidate){$proxy=$proxyCandidate}};$server=$null;$paths=@([IO.Path]::Combine($env:USERPROFILE,'.dotnet','tools','csharp-ls.exe'));for($i=0;$i -lt 480 -and -not $server;$i++){foreach($p in $paths){if(Test-Path $p){$server=$p;break}};if(-not $server){$cmd=Get-Command csharp-ls -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue;if($cmd -and $cmd.Source){$server=$cmd.Source}};if(-not $server){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 250}};if(-not $server){exit 127};$root=$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR;if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($root)){$root=(Get-Location).Path};if(Test-Path $root){Set-Location $root};$sln=Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter '*.sln' -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1;$csproj=Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter '*.csproj' -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1;$fsproj=Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter '*.fsproj' -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1;if($sln){if(Test-Path $proxy){& $proxy $server '--loglevel' 'error' '--solution' $sln.FullName}else{& $server '--loglevel' 'error' '--solution' $sln.FullName}}elseif($csproj -or $fsproj){if(Test-Path $proxy){& $proxy $server '--loglevel' 'error'}else{& $server '--loglevel' 'error'}}else{$dummyDir=[IO.Path]::Combine($env:LOCALAPPDATA,'EnriLSP','workspaces','csharp-empty');New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dummyDir | Out-Null;$dummySln=[IO.Path]::Combine($dummyDir,'Empty.sln');if(-not (Test-Path $dummySln)){Set-Content -Path $dummySln -Value @('Microsoft Visual Studio Solution File, Format Version 12.00','# Visual Studio Version 17','VisualStudioVersion = 17.0.31903.59','MinimumVisualStudioVersion = 10.0.40219.1','Global','EndGlobal') -Encoding Ascii};if(Test-Path $proxy){& $proxy $server '--loglevel' 'error' '--solution' $dummySln}else{& $server '--loglevel' 'error' '--solution' $dummySln}}
